name: Facial Tissues 3-Ply
story: Soft 3-ply facial tissue that keeps the brand feeling bright and premium even in a smaller footprint.

name: Bathroom Tissues 4-Ply
story: This is the lead bath tissue format: soft in use, graphic on shelf, and sturdy enough to feel premium instead of disposable.

name: Facial Tissue 24-Pack
story: The larger case format keeps the kraft-box feel while giving the category a more confident warehouse-to-home presence.

name: Bath Tissue 6-Roll Pack
story: The compact pack keeps the same softness and septic-safe story while fitting smaller spaces and smaller runs.

name: Bath Tissue 24-Roll Bundle
story: This bundle pushes the brand toward distribution-ready utility without losing the softer July Sunflowers tone.
